hero.imageAlt: Freshly painted modern home exterior with crisp trim
hero.headline: Next Level Finish.

intro.label: We are Elite Painting
intro.body: We're a premium residential and commercial painting contractor. Sharp lines, clean job sites, durable finishes — every project backed by a 5-year labor warranty on interior and exterior work.

configuratorTeaser.headline: Estimate your paint project.
configuratorTeaser.body: Enter square footage, trim linear feet, and color count — get a ballpark in under a minute.

zPatternRows.label: Interior & Exterior
zPatternRows.headline: Every surface, every season.
zPatternRows.body: Interior rooms, exterior siding, trim, cabinet refinishing, epoxy floors. We prep like it matters — because it does. Prep is 80% of a paint job's lifespan.

zPatternRows.label: Color Consultation
zPatternRows.headline: Pick a color you won't regret.
zPatternRows.body: Free color consultation with every project. Swatches on your wall, lit the way your light hits it. We'd rather spend an extra hour than repaint it next year.

footerCta.headline: Configure your paint project.
footerCta.subhead: Get in touch for a color consultation and quote.
